title: Slashing the deck
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Slashing the deck''' was a technique used by both the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] and the [[Sith fleet (New Sith Wars)|Sith fleet]] in the [[New Sith Wars]]. In it, attack ships would move along a vector that allowed them minimal fire from an enemy ship's weapons, then double back and return fire again. It was dangerous if the enemy ship could call upon support of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] or other capital ships.

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}}
